title: NANA Shareholders Elect 2022 Board of Directors
summary: During NANA’s Annual Meeting of Shareholders, held today virtually via nanatkut.com , NANA shareholders voted to elect eight directors to the NANA board. Newly elected directors: Gia Hanna, Gladys Jones, Tony Jones Jr., Gloria Carter, Mary Adams, David Field, Allen Ticket Sr. and Linda Lee. They wil...

title: Ahtna Announces Shareholder and Elder Dividend Distribution for 2022
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – The Board of Directors and the Trustees of Ahtna Hwt’aene (People’s) Trust have declared a shareholder distribution of $10.00 per share. The distribution will be made to all shareholders of record as of March 16, 2022 and will be non-taxable. In addition, a distribution of $1,250...

title: Straight Ahead, the Significance of a New Sculpture in Juneau
summary: Yaadachoon is a 20-foot aluminum sculpture of a traditional Tlingit canoe that was installed in downtown Juneau in late 2021. The post Straight Ahead, the Significance of a New Sculpture in Juneau appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Kawerak, Inc. Receives $8 Million in Unrestricted Donation
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE March 25, 2022 Kawerak, Inc.
